revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{lua|Module:HTMLDecode}} {{tsh|CatAutoTOC}} Adds a Table of Contents (TOC) to a category page if the category's size warrants it. The size thresholds are: # <= 100 pages → no TOC # 101–1200 pages → {{tl|Category TOC}} # > 1200 pages → {{tl|Large category TOC}} ==Usage== {{Automatic category TOC}} On category pages, {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} can be placed wherever you want the TOC to be displayed. On a category header template, it is best placed outside any {{tag|includeonly}} tags, so that the template is categorised as using this template. === Parameters === No parameters are needed. However, the parameters available to {{tl|Category TOC}} may be supplied, and if {{t|Automatic category TOC}} calls {{tl|Category TOC}}, those parameters will be passed on to {{tl|Category TOC}}. So, for example, {{Automatic category TOC|align=center}} will: # Have no effect if no TOC is generated # Align to the center if {{tl|Category TOC}} is used # Have no effect if {{tl|Large category TOC}} is used, because {{tl|Large category TOC}} accepts no parameters == Tracking ==
{{Automatic category TOC stats}}
Each page using this template is categorised in one of three tracking categories: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates no TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates standard Category TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates Large category TOC}} Templates which transclude {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} are categorised in * {{clc|Templates using Automatic category TOC}} ... but only if the transclusion is outside any {{tag|noinclude}} tags. {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == Bugs == This template uses the [[Help:Magic words|magic word]] {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} to count the number of pages in the category. Unfortunately, this function can return wildly erroneous results on some categories which have had many pages added and removed. This bug is well-known, and has been documented in several places since 2010, including: * [[phab:T18036]] * [[phab:T221795]] * [[phab:T69196]] In the overwhelming majority of categories, the count is recorded accurately enough to support use of this template. However, there seemed to be some issue with {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} falsely returning zero in some cases. This is tracked in: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC on pages where PAGESINCATEGORY returns zero}} As of 19 April 2020, that problem seems to have been fixed by a [[Special:Diff/950933704/951919806|small but cunning tweak]] to how {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} is called. The category should contain only pages labelled as "empty". {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == See also == {{Category TOC see also}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia category table of contents templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{lua|Module:HTMLDecode}} {{tsh|CatAutoTOC}} Adds a Table of Contents (TOC) to a category page if the category's size warrants it. The size thresholds are: # <= 100 pages → no TOC # 101–1200 pages → {{tl|Category TOC}} # > 1200 pages → {{tl|Large category TOC}} ==Usage== {{Automatic category TOC}} On category pages, {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} can be placed wherever you want the TOC to be displayed. On a category header template, it is best placed outside any {{tag|includeonly}} tags, so that the template is categorised as using this template. === Parameters === No parameters are needed. However, the parameters available to {{tl|Category TOC}} may be supplied, and if {{t|Automatic category TOC}} calls {{tl|Category TOC}}, those parameters will be passed on to {{tl|Category TOC}}. So, for example, {{Automatic category TOC|align=center}} will: # Have no effect if no TOC is generated # Align to the center if {{tl|Category TOC}} is used # Have no effect if {{tl|Large category TOC}} is used, because {{tl|Large category TOC}} accepts no parameters == Tracking ==
{{Automatic category TOC stats}}
Each page using this template is categorised in one of three tracking categories: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates no TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates standard Category TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates Large category TOC}} Templates which transclude {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} are categorised in * {{clc|Templates using Automatic category TOC}} ... but only if the transclusion is outside any {{tag|noinclude}} tags. {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == Bugs == This template uses the [[Help:Magic words|magic word]] {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} to count the number of pages in the category. Unfortunately, this function can return wildly erroneous results on some categories which have had many pages added and removed. This bug is well-known, and has been documented in several places since 2010, including: * [[phab:T18036]] * [[phab:T221795]] * [[phab:T69196]] In the overwhelming majority of categories, the count is recorded accurately enough to support use of this template. However, there seemed to be some issue with {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} falsely returning zero in some cases. This is tracked in: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC on pages where PAGESINCATEGORY returns zero}} As of 19 April 2020, that problem seems to have been fixed by a [[Special:Diff/950933704/951919806|small but cunning tweak]] to how {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} is called. The category should contain only pages labelled as "empty". {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == See also == {{Category TOC see also}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia category table of contents templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{lua|Module:HTMLDecode}} {{tsh|CatAutoTOC}} Adds a Table of Contents (TOC) to a category page if the category's size warrants it. The size thresholds are: # <= 100 pages → no TOC # 101–1200 pages → {{tl|Category TOC}} # > 1200 pages → {{tl|Large category TOC}} ==Usage== {{Automatic category TOC}} On category pages, {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} can be placed wherever you want the TOC to be displayed. On a category header template, it is best placed outside any {{tag|includeonly}} tags, so that the template is categorised as using this template. === Parameters === No parameters are needed. However, the parameters available to {{tl|Category TOC}} may be supplied, and if {{t|Automatic category TOC}} calls {{tl|Category TOC}}, those parameters will be passed on to {{tl|Category TOC}}. So, for example, {{Automatic category TOC|align=center}} will: # Have no effect if no TOC is generated # Align to the center if {{tl|Category TOC}} is used # Have no effect if {{tl|Large category TOC}} is used, because {{tl|Large category TOC}} accepts no parameters == Tracking ==
{{Automatic category TOC stats}}
Each page using this template is categorised in one of three tracking categories: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates no TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates standard Category TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates Large category TOC}} Templates which transclude {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} are categorised in * {{clc|Templates using Automatic category TOC}} ... but only if the transclusion is outside any {{tag|noinclude}} tags. {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == Bugs == This template uses the [[Help:Magic words|magic word]] {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} to count the number of pages in the category. Unfortunately, this function can return wildly erroneous results on some categories which have had many pages added and removed. This bug is well-known, and has been documented in several places since 2010, including: * [[phab:T18036]] * [[phab:T221795]] * [[phab:T69196]] In the overwhelming majority of categories, the count is recorded accurately enough to support use of this template. However, there seemed to be some issue with {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} falsely returning zero in some cases. This is tracked in: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC on pages where PAGESINCATEGORY returns zero}} As of 19 April 2020, that problem seems to have been fixed by a [[Special:Diff/950933704/951919806|small but cunning tweak]] to how {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} is called. The category should contain only pages labelled as "empty". {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == See also == {{Category TOC see also}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia category table of contents templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{lua|Module:HTMLDecode}} {{tsh|CatAutoTOC}} Adds a Table of Contents (TOC) to a category page if the category's size warrants it. The size thresholds are: # <= 100 pages → no TOC # 101–1200 pages → {{tl|Category TOC}} # > 1200 pages → {{tl|Large category TOC}} ==Usage== {{Automatic category TOC}} On category pages, {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} can be placed wherever you want the TOC to be displayed. On a category header template, it is best placed outside any {{tag|includeonly}} tags, so that the template is categorised as using this template. === Parameters === No parameters are needed. However, the parameters available to {{tl|Category TOC}} may be supplied, and if {{t|Automatic category TOC}} calls {{tl|Category TOC}}, those parameters will be passed on to {{tl|Category TOC}}. So, for example, {{Automatic category TOC|align=center}} will: # Have no effect if no TOC is generated # Align to the center if {{tl|Category TOC}} is used # Have no effect if {{tl|Large category TOC}} is used, because {{tl|Large category TOC}} accepts no parameters == Tracking ==
{{Automatic category TOC stats}}
Each page using this template is categorised in one of three tracking categories: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates no TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates standard Category TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates Large category TOC}} Templates which transclude {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} are categorised in * {{clc|Templates using Automatic category TOC}} ... but only if the transclusion is outside any {{tag|noinclude}} tags. {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == Bugs == This template uses the [[Help:Magic words|magic word]] {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} to count the number of pages in the category. Unfortunately, this function can return wildly erroneous results on some categories which have had many pages added and removed. This bug is well-known, and has been documented in several places since 2010, including: * [[phab:T18036]] * [[phab:T221795]] * [[phab:T69196]] In the overwhelming majority of categories, the count is recorded accurately enough to support use of this template. However, there seemed to be some issue with {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} falsely returning zero in some cases. This is tracked in: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC on pages where PAGESINCATEGORY returns zero}} As of 19 April 2020, that problem seems to have been fixed by a [[Special:Diff/950933704/951919806|small but cunning tweak]] to how {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} is called. The category should contain only pages labelled as "empty". {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == See also == {{Category TOC see also}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia category table of contents templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{lua|Module:HTMLDecode}} {{tsh|CatAutoTOC}} Adds a Table of Contents (TOC) to a category page if the category's size warrants it. The size thresholds are: # <= 100 pages → no TOC # 101–1200 pages → {{tl|Category TOC}} # > 1200 pages → {{tl|Large category TOC}} ==Usage== {{Automatic category TOC}} On category pages, {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} can be placed wherever you want the TOC to be displayed. On a category header template, it is best placed outside any {{tag|includeonly}} tags, so that the template is categorised as using this template. === Parameters === No parameters are needed. However, the parameters available to {{tl|Category TOC}} may be supplied, and if {{t|Automatic category TOC}} calls {{tl|Category TOC}}, those parameters will be passed on to {{tl|Category TOC}}. So, for example, {{Automatic category TOC|align=center}} will: # Have no effect if no TOC is generated # Align to the center if {{tl|Category TOC}} is used # Have no effect if {{tl|Large category TOC}} is used, because {{tl|Large category TOC}} accepts no parameters == Tracking ==
{{Automatic category TOC stats}}
Each page using this template is categorised in one of three tracking categories: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates no TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates standard Category TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates Large category TOC}} Templates which transclude {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} are categorised in * {{clc|Templates using Automatic category TOC}} ... but only if the transclusion is outside any {{tag|noinclude}} tags. {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == Bugs == This template uses the [[Help:Magic words|magic word]] {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} to count the number of pages in the category. Unfortunately, this function can return wildly erroneous results on some categories which have had many pages added and removed. This bug is well-known, and has been documented in several places since 2010, including: * [[phab:T18036]] * [[phab:T221795]] * [[phab:T69196]] In the overwhelming majority of categories, the count is recorded accurately enough to support use of this template. However, there seemed to be some issue with {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} falsely returning zero in some cases. This is tracked in: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC on pages where PAGESINCATEGORY returns zero}} As of 19 April 2020, that problem seems to have been fixed by a [[Special:Diff/950933704/951919806|small but cunning tweak]] to how {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} is called. The category should contain only pages labelled as "empty". {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == See also == {{Category TOC see also}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia category table of contents templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{lua|Module:HTMLDecode}} {{tsh|CatAutoTOC}} Adds a Table of Contents (TOC) to a category page if the category's size warrants it. The size thresholds are: # <= 100 pages → no TOC # 101–1200 pages → {{tl|Category TOC}} # > 1200 pages → {{tl|Large category TOC}} ==Usage== {{Automatic category TOC}} On category pages, {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} can be placed wherever you want the TOC to be displayed. On a category header template, it is best placed outside any {{tag|includeonly}} tags, so that the template is categorised as using this template. === Parameters === No parameters are needed. However, the parameters available to {{tl|Category TOC}} may be supplied, and if {{t|Automatic category TOC}} calls {{tl|Category TOC}}, those parameters will be passed on to {{tl|Category TOC}}. So, for example, {{Automatic category TOC|align=center}} will: # Have no effect if no TOC is generated # Align to the center if {{tl|Category TOC}} is used # Have no effect if {{tl|Large category TOC}} is used, because {{tl|Large category TOC}} accepts no parameters == Tracking ==
{{Automatic category TOC stats}}
Each page using this template is categorised in one of three tracking categories: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates no TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates standard Category TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates Large category TOC}} Templates which transclude {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} are categorised in * {{clc|Templates using Automatic category TOC}} ... but only if the transclusion is outside any {{tag|noinclude}} tags. {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == Bugs == This template uses the [[Help:Magic words|magic word]] {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} to count the number of pages in the category. Unfortunately, this function can return wildly erroneous results on some categories which have had many pages added and removed. This bug is well-known, and has been documented in several places since 2010, including: * [[phab:T18036]] * [[phab:T221795]] * [[phab:T69196]] In the overwhelming majority of categories, the count is recorded accurately enough to support use of this template. However, there seemed to be some issue with {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} falsely returning zero in some cases. This is tracked in: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC on pages where PAGESINCATEGORY returns zero}} As of 19 April 2020, that problem seems to have been fixed by a [[Special:Diff/950933704/951919806|small but cunning tweak]] to how {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} is called. The category should contain only pages labelled as "empty". {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == See also == {{Category TOC see also}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia category table of contents templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{lua|Module:HTMLDecode}} {{tsh|CatAutoTOC}} Adds a Table of Contents (TOC) to a category page if the category's size warrants it. The size thresholds are: # <= 100 pages → no TOC # 101–1200 pages → {{tl|Category TOC}} # > 1200 pages → {{tl|Large category TOC}} ==Usage== {{Automatic category TOC}} On category pages, {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} can be placed wherever you want the TOC to be displayed. On a category header template, it is best placed outside any {{tag|includeonly}} tags, so that the template is categorised as using this template. === Parameters === No parameters are needed. However, the parameters available to {{tl|Category TOC}} may be supplied, and if {{t|Automatic category TOC}} calls {{tl|Category TOC}}, those parameters will be passed on to {{tl|Category TOC}}. So, for example, {{Automatic category TOC|align=center}} will: # Have no effect if no TOC is generated # Align to the center if {{tl|Category TOC}} is used # Have no effect if {{tl|Large category TOC}} is used, because {{tl|Large category TOC}} accepts no parameters == Tracking ==
{{Automatic category TOC stats}}
Each page using this template is categorised in one of three tracking categories: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates no TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates standard Category TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates Large category TOC}} Templates which transclude {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} are categorised in * {{clc|Templates using Automatic category TOC}} ... but only if the transclusion is outside any {{tag|noinclude}} tags. {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == Bugs == This template uses the [[Help:Magic words|magic word]] {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} to count the number of pages in the category. Unfortunately, this function can return wildly erroneous results on some categories which have had many pages added and removed. This bug is well-known, and has been documented in several places since 2010, including: * [[phab:T18036]] * [[phab:T221795]] * [[phab:T69196]] In the overwhelming majority of categories, the count is recorded accurately enough to support use of this template. However, there seemed to be some issue with {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} falsely returning zero in some cases. This is tracked in: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC on pages where PAGESINCATEGORY returns zero}} As of 19 April 2020, that problem seems to have been fixed by a [[Special:Diff/950933704/951919806|small but cunning tweak]] to how {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} is called. The category should contain only pages labelled as "empty". {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == See also == {{Category TOC see also}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia category table of contents templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{lua|Module:HTMLDecode}} {{tsh|CatAutoTOC}} Adds a Table of Contents (TOC) to a category page if the category's size warrants it. The size thresholds are: # <= 100 pages → no TOC # 101–1200 pages → {{tl|Category TOC}} # > 1200 pages → {{tl|Large category TOC}} ==Usage== {{Automatic category TOC}} On category pages, {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} can be placed wherever you want the TOC to be displayed. On a category header template, it is best placed outside any {{tag|includeonly}} tags, so that the template is categorised as using this template. === Parameters === No parameters are needed. However, the parameters available to {{tl|Category TOC}} may be supplied, and if {{t|Automatic category TOC}} calls {{tl|Category TOC}}, those parameters will be passed on to {{tl|Category TOC}}. So, for example, {{Automatic category TOC|align=center}} will: # Have no effect if no TOC is generated # Align to the center if {{tl|Category TOC}} is used # Have no effect if {{tl|Large category TOC}} is used, because {{tl|Large category TOC}} accepts no parameters == Tracking ==
{{Automatic category TOC stats}}
Each page using this template is categorised in one of three tracking categories: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates no TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates standard Category TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates Large category TOC}} Templates which transclude {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} are categorised in * {{clc|Templates using Automatic category TOC}} ... but only if the transclusion is outside any {{tag|noinclude}} tags. {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == Bugs == This template uses the [[Help:Magic words|magic word]] {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} to count the number of pages in the category. Unfortunately, this function can return wildly erroneous results on some categories which have had many pages added and removed. This bug is well-known, and has been documented in several places since 2010, including: * [[phab:T18036]] * [[phab:T221795]] * [[phab:T69196]] In the overwhelming majority of categories, the count is recorded accurately enough to support use of this template. However, there seemed to be some issue with {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} falsely returning zero in some cases. This is tracked in: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC on pages where PAGESINCATEGORY returns zero}} As of 19 April 2020, that problem seems to have been fixed by a [[Special:Diff/950933704/951919806|small but cunning tweak]] to how {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} is called. The category should contain only pages labelled as "empty". {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == See also == {{Category TOC see also}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia category table of contents templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{lua|Module:HTMLDecode}} {{tsh|CatAutoTOC}} Adds a Table of Contents (TOC) to a category page if the category's size warrants it. The size thresholds are: # <= 100 pages → no TOC # 101–1200 pages → {{tl|Category TOC}} # > 1200 pages → {{tl|Large category TOC}} ==Usage== {{Automatic category TOC}} On category pages, {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} can be placed wherever you want the TOC to be displayed. On a category header template, it is best placed outside any {{tag|includeonly}} tags, so that the template is categorised as using this template. === Parameters === No parameters are needed. However, the parameters available to {{tl|Category TOC}} may be supplied, and if {{t|Automatic category TOC}} calls {{tl|Category TOC}}, those parameters will be passed on to {{tl|Category TOC}}. So, for example, {{Automatic category TOC|align=center}} will: # Have no effect if no TOC is generated # Align to the center if {{tl|Category TOC}} is used # Have no effect if {{tl|Large category TOC}} is used, because {{tl|Large category TOC}} accepts no parameters == Tracking ==
{{Automatic category TOC stats}}
Each page using this template is categorised in one of three tracking categories: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates no TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates standard Category TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates Large category TOC}} Templates which transclude {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} are categorised in * {{clc|Templates using Automatic category TOC}} ... but only if the transclusion is outside any {{tag|noinclude}} tags. {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == Bugs == This template uses the [[Help:Magic words|magic word]] {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} to count the number of pages in the category. Unfortunately, this function can return wildly erroneous results on some categories which have had many pages added and removed. This bug is well-known, and has been documented in several places since 2010, including: * [[phab:T18036]] * [[phab:T221795]] * [[phab:T69196]] In the overwhelming majority of categories, the count is recorded accurately enough to support use of this template. However, there seemed to be some issue with {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} falsely returning zero in some cases. This is tracked in: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC on pages where PAGESINCATEGORY returns zero}} As of 19 April 2020, that problem seems to have been fixed by a [[Special:Diff/950933704/951919806|small but cunning tweak]] to how {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} is called. The category should contain only pages labelled as "empty". {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == See also == {{Category TOC see also}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia category table of contents templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Automatic_category_TOC%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{lua|Module:HTMLDecode}} {{tsh|CatAutoTOC}} Adds a Table of Contents (TOC) to a category page if the category's size warrants it. The size thresholds are: # <= 100 pages → no TOC # 101–1200 pages → {{tl|Category TOC}} # > 1200 pages → {{tl|Large category TOC}} ==Usage== {{Automatic category TOC}} On category pages, {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} can be placed wherever you want the TOC to be displayed. On a category header template, it is best placed outside any {{tag|includeonly}} tags, so that the template is categorised as using this template. === Parameters === No parameters are needed. However, the parameters available to {{tl|Category TOC}} may be supplied, and if {{t|Automatic category TOC}} calls {{tl|Category TOC}}, those parameters will be passed on to {{tl|Category TOC}}. So, for example, {{Automatic category TOC|align=center}} will: # Have no effect if no TOC is generated # Align to the center if {{tl|Category TOC}} is used # Have no effect if {{tl|Large category TOC}} is used, because {{tl|Large category TOC}} accepts no parameters == Tracking ==
{{Automatic category TOC stats}}
Each page using this template is categorised in one of three tracking categories: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates no TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates standard Category TOC}} * {{clc|Automatic category TOC generates Large category TOC}} Templates which transclude {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} are categorised in * {{clc|Templates using Automatic category TOC}} ... but only if the transclusion is outside any {{tag|noinclude}} tags. {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == Bugs == This template uses the [[Help:Magic words|magic word]] {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} to count the number of pages in the category. Unfortunately, this function can return wildly erroneous results on some categories which have had many pages added and removed. This bug is well-known, and has been documented in several places since 2010, including: * [[phab:T18036]] * [[phab:T221795]] * [[phab:T69196]] In the overwhelming majority of categories, the count is recorded accurately enough to support use of this template. However, there seemed to be some issue with {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} falsely returning zero in some cases. This is tracked in: * {{clc|Automatic category TOC on pages where PAGESINCATEGORY returns zero}} As of 19 April 2020, that problem seems to have been fixed by a [[Special:Diff/950933704/951919806|small but cunning tweak]] to how {{PAGESINCATEGORY}} is called. The category should contain only pages labelled as "empty". {{Purge|''Purge this page to update the totals''}} == See also == {{Category TOC see also}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia category table of contents templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
